rationale: Both correctly flag the audio_vae.py config-mutation issue and the patch_emission.py +2 window change, matching real GT threads. But X completely misses the serving_speech.py language/dialect-dropping issue, which was a substantive, actively-discussed GT concern (amy-why-3459/LHXuuu) — a notable recall gap. Y catches that concern explicitly and adds a plausible, grounded extra finding (stale README table) from checking the full PR-time tree, giving it broader coverage without sacrificing groundedness. Both are reasonably actionable with file/line citations, but Y's evidence-tagged, specific suggestions edge out X's narrative style.
